example.title: Customer-onboarding to-be excerpt
example.inputs: Need metric: backlog>7d count → target 80. Horizon 9 months.
example.output: { "outcomes": [{"id": "o1", "target": "backlog>7d <= 80", "unit": "tickets", "source": "analytics export", "trace_to_need": "support-backlog-need-metric-1"}], "capabilities": [{"id": "cap-1", "desc": "Automated ID-document re-verification"}], "systems": [{"id": "sys-kyc-2", "desc": "Identity-verification system (vendor selected later via options analysis)"}], "approver": "Olena Kovalenko (COO)", "approval_by": "2026-06-30" }
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (trace), r2 (target+unit+source), r5 (no vendor name).
